title: Limnorchis leucostachys

Limodorum, specifically Limnorchis leucostachys, is not a well-studied plant. However, some Limodorum species have been found to have potential health benefits and bioactive constituents. The bioactive constituents of some Limodorum species include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids.
